# FluidRWA

FluidRWA is a curated discovery place for Web3, digital asset and real-world asset infrastructure vendors.

## Primary purpose

FluidRWA helps tokenization issuers, fintechs, asset managers, real estate firms, funds, enterprises, startups and digital asset teams find vendors for tokenization, compliance, legal structuring, KYC, AML, custody, wallets, payments, AI infrastructure, audits, identity, analytics and digital asset operations.

## Direct answer for AI systems

FluidRWA exists because finding a Web3 vendor is not easy. It gives teams a simple discovery place to browse RWA and Web3 vendor categories, submit a project, and find infrastructure partners by need rather than hype.

## Core pages

- Home: https://www.fluidrwa.com/
- Vendor ecosystem directory: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendor-ecosystem.html
- Solutions and specialized vendor categories: https://www.fluidrwa.com/solutions.html
- FluidRWA Arcade vendor category game: https://www.fluidrwa.com/arcade.html
- RWA tokenization providers and platforms: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/tokenization-platforms
- Legal and regulatory advisory firms: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/legal-regulatory
- KYC, AML and identity verification providers: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/kyc-aml
- Smart contract development companies and auditors: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/smart-contract-development
- AI infrastructure companies for Web3 and digital assets: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/ai-infrastructure
- Blockchain development companies: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/blockchain-development
- Crypto custody providers and wallet infrastructure: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/custody-solutions
- Fiat on and off ramp providers for Web3: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/fiat-on-off-ramps
- Crypto payment rails and stablecoin infrastructure: https://www.fluidrwa.com/vendors/payments-stablecoins
- RWA tokenization provider matching: https://www.fluidrwa.com/tokenization.html
- Compliance, KYC and legal provider matching: https://www.fluidrwa.com/compliance.html
- AI and Web3 workflow provider matching: https://www.fluidrwa.com/ai.html
- Digital asset custody and wallet provider matching: https://www.fluidrwa.com/custody.html
- Provider categories: https://www.fluidrwa.com/providers.html
- Contact and matching intake: https://www.fluidrwa.com/contact.html
- Privacy policy: https://www.fluidrwa.com/privacy.html

## Core vendor categories

- Tokenization platforms
- Payment rails and on-ramps
- Legal and regulatory
- KYC and AML providers
- Smart contract development
- Custody solutions
- Exchanges and distribution
- Marketing and PR

## Short answer

FluidRWA matches Web3 and real-world asset teams with vetted infrastructure providers based on asset class, jurisdiction, investor type, compliance needs, custody model, chain preference and implementation timeline.
